description_long: This object is a sleek, modern router or modem with a predominantly black, glossy exterior and a rectangular base. The front panel features a display area with a grayscale image and Cyrillic text, likely for branding or user information, as well as two dates and a short inscription. The main body rises vertically from the base, forming a monolithic slab with sharp, clean edges and a smooth finish. The top and sides are unadorned, emphasizing the minimalist design, while the front panel is slightly angled for visibility. The base is slightly wider than the upright section, providing stability and a subtle two-tone effect with a lighter strip at the bottom. No external antennas, indicator lights, or visible ports are present on the exterior.
description: A modern, black, glossy router or modem with a vertical slab design, a display panel with Cyrillic text, and a stable rectangular base. The object is minimalist, with no visible antennas or ports.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid, glossy black body and the rectangular base with a slight step at the bottom.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the grayscale image, Cyrillic text, and dates on the angled panel, with the upright slab rising from the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the left side, with the same solid, glossy black finish and stepped base.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, unadorned back of the upright slab and the full width of the base.
